## Check yourself

- [ ] Code follows the [contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md#pull-request-guidelines) <!-- required 🔒 -->
- [ ] All new/updated code is covered by tests
- [ ] New package installed? - Tested in different environments (browser/node)
- [ ] Documentation update considered <!-- required 🔒 -->

## Security

- [ ] The security impact of the change has been considered <!-- required 🔒 -->
- [ ] Code follows company security practices and guidelines <!-- required 🔒 -->
